final_response: No — per the 2026-04-15 decision (decisions.md), all four Q2 engineering hires are mid-level only (3–7 yrs); no staff or senior staff recs open this quarter. Recruiting should decline the candidate politely with a "not this round" note; re-evaluate at Q3 planning.
